introSection: Jet Coaster (Japanese: ジェットコースター) is a steel roller coaster located at Nagashima Spa Land in Kuwana, Mie, Japan.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster originally opened on 29 April 1966 as the park’s first ever roller coaster. In 1985, the tracks were replaced by tubular steel tracks from Togo.

fullText:
Jet Coaster (Japanese: ジェットコースター) is a steel roller coaster located at Nagashima Spa Land in Kuwana, Mie, Japan.

The coaster originally opened on 29 April 1966 as the park’s first ever roller coaster. In 1985, the tracks were replaced by tubular steel tracks from Togo.



Brown track and supports.
